messages.content: When is the next bus for Euclid loop?

outputs.final_response:
The next bus for the Euclid Loop is scheduled to depart from College Place at 8:30 PM, arriving at the subsequent stops as follows:

- Genesee Irving at 8:37 PM
- Genesee Crouse at 8:38 PM
- Genesee Westcott at 8:42 PM
- Westcott Euclid at 8:46 PM
- College Place at 8:55 PM

If you need more information or updates, please check the latest schedules at [Syracuse University Transportation](https://parking.syr.edu/transportation/shuttle-information/campus-shuttle-schedules/).
